Observed_counts.description: Observed frequencies of pay increase categories (None, Standard, Merit) from a random sample of 600 employees.

Proposed_proportions.description: The firm's proposed (expected) proportions for each pay increase category, used to compute expected frequencies.

Sample_size.description: Total number of employees in the random sample, used together with proposed proportions to compute expected frequencies (e.g., 600×0.10=60, 600×0.65=390, 600×0.25=150).
